inputs.label: Average Cover Price (Menu Price)
inputs.businessContext: Average price paid per guest for a main dish or complete meal as listed on the menu.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average price paid per guest for a main dish or complete meal as listed on the menu.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Menüde listelenen ana yemek veya tam öğün için misafir başına ödenen ortalama fiyat.

inputs.label: Food Cost per Cover
inputs.businessContext: Direct ingredient cost allocated to each cover (plate cost).

businessContext_i18n.en: Direct ingredient cost allocated to each cover (plate cost).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Her kapsam için ayrılan doğrudan içerik maliyeti (tabak maliyeti).

inputs.label: Labor Cost per Cover
inputs.businessContext: Direct labor (kitchen + service) cost per guest.

businessContext_i18n.en: Direct labor (kitchen + service) cost per guest.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Misafir başına doğrudan işçilik (mutfak + servis) maliyeti.

inputs.label: Overhead per Cover
inputs.businessContext: Rent, utilities, insurance, and other fixed costs allocated per cover.

businessContext_i18n.en: Rent, utilities, insurance, and other fixed costs allocated per cover.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kapsam başına ayrılan kira, elektrik, sigorta ve diğer sabit maliyetler.

inputs.label: Food Waste Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of food purchased that is discarded due to spoilage, overproduction, or plate waste.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of food purchased that is discarded due to spoilage, overproduction, or plate waste.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bozulma, aşırı üretim veya tabak israfı nedeniyle atılan satın alınan yiyecek yüzdesi.

inputs.label: Theft & Shrinkage Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Estimated loss of inventory due to theft, misreporting, or unrecorded consumption.

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated loss of inventory due to theft, misreporting, or unrecorded consumption.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hırsızlık, yanlış raporlama veya kaydedilmemiş tüketim nedeniyle tahmini envanter kaybı.

inputs.label: Discount & Comp Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of revenue lost due to employee meals, promotions, comps, and discounts.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of revenue lost due to employee meals, promotions, comps, and discounts.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Personel yemekleri, promosyonlar, ikramlar ve indirimler nedeniyle kaybedilen gelir yüzdesi.

inputs.label: Covers per Period (Monthly)
inputs.businessContext: Total number of guests served in the measurement period (month).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of guests served in the measurement period (month).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ölçüm döneminde (ay) hizmet verilen toplam misafir sayısı.

rules.message: Total direct costs exceed or equal the cover price. Margin is negative or zero.
Combined waste and theft exceeds 15% — critical operational leak.
Low lean maturity combined with high discounts indicates lack of process control.

thresholds.message: Net margin below 10% — investigate cost drivers.
Total leak per cover exceeds $2.00 — immediate action recommended.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
